title: Find missing factors (1-digit multiplication)
description: Find missing factors in 1-digit multiplication problems. Products are less than or equal to 100.
topic_path: Module 3: Multiplication and division with units of 0, 1, 6–9, and multiples of 10
Topic E: Analysis of patterns and problem solving including units of 0 and 1
